steps.title: Rewrite the radical as an exponent
Equate exponents
steps.content: Since both sides have base $5$, set the exponents equal: $$6c=\frac{5}{3}.$$

steps.title: Solve for $c$
steps.content: Divide by $6$: $$c=\frac{5}{3}\cdot\frac{1}{6}=\frac{5}{18}\approx 0.2778.$$ The stored answer is 5/18. The exact fraction and this decimal represent the same value.
